title: olacaceae
intro: The Olacaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, commonly known as the sarsaparilla family. This family consists of approximately 35 genera and 400 species of plants, which are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world. The plants within the Olacaceae family often exhibit characteristics such as simple leaves, small flowers, and a unique reproductive system. The diversity of the Olacaceae family includes a range of plants, from the familiar sarsaparilla to the lesser-known genera, showcasing the complexity and variety within this group.
